case_title: AMERICAN FIRST INSURANCE COMPANY vs. ARNOLD, ROBERT et al

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-07-1995, CONTINUED TO JUL-07-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 6/30/95. OSC DISCHARGED, NO CONTEMPT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN FIRST INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARNOLD, ROBERT $1,282.77 PRINCIPAL, $348.43 INTEREST, $82.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,713.95
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN FIRST INSURANCE COMPANY
